name: cd-option-terminator
title: Use cd -- in the repo-root guards
description: Copilot on loadsmith #48 (comments 3522664869/79/81): the 0.5.14 root guards call cd "$REPO_ROOT" without the -- option terminator the same scripts use when resolving SCRIPT_DIR/REPO_ROOT, so a dash-prefixed root would parse as a cd option. Add -- at all three guard sites; ship as 0.5.15 and fold into the open fleet PRs.
creator: sdelmas
